title: Saved views for the ticket queue
description:
Support leads want to pin their own filtered slices of the ticket queue. From the queue toolbar:
- Let a user name and save the current filter + sort combination as a view.
- Show saved views as tabs across the top of the queue, in the order they were created.
- Selecting a view applies its filters and sort instantly without a full page reload.
- A user can rename or delete only the views they created.
- Deleting the active view falls back to the default All Open view.

comments.author: dev.lead@example.com
comments.body: AC field was left blank in Jira — the behaviour is spelled out as bullets in the description, please derive from there rather than guessing new rules.
